hero.title: Environmental Impact of Back Market
hero.description: Discover how Back Market is revolutionizing the refurbished electronics market and its commitment to environmental sustainability.

circular_economy.title: Circular Economy
circular_economy.description: We give a second life to electronic devices, reducing the need to extract new raw materials and manufacture from scratch.

co2.title: CO₂ Reduction
co2.description: Each refurbished device prevents tons of CO₂ emissions compared to manufacturing a brand new one.

social.title: Social Impact
social.description: We make technology more accessible and contribute to the creation of green jobs within the recycling sector.

cta_section.title: Join the Sustainable Revolution
cta_section.description: Discover how Back Market is changing the world, one device at a time.

hero.title: Why This Company?
hero.subtitle: Back Market is the leading marketplace for refurbished electronic devices, committed to a more sustainable future.

ewaste.title: Significant reduction of electronic waste
ewaste.description: Every year, 50 million tons of electronic waste are generated globally. Back Market gives devices a second life, preventing them from ending up in landfills.

circular.title: Commitment to the circular economy
circular.description: We promote an economic model where products maintain their value for as long as possible, minimizing the use of natural resources and waste generation.

transparency.title: Transparency in sustainable practices
transparency.description: We regularly publish detailed reports on our environmental impact, certifications, and sustainability goals to maintain our customers' trust.

quality.title: Certification and quality guarantee
quality.description: All devices go through a rigorous 40-point inspection process to ensure they work like new, backed by a minimum 12-month warranty.

refurbished.title: Refurbished Device
refurbished.item3: 7 kg of CO₂ emitted (shipping and processing)

step1.title: Full Diagnosis
step1.description: Each device undergoes an exhaustive 40-point checklist to identify any hidden issues.

step2.title: Refurbishing
step2.description: Professional cleaning, replacement of defective components, and software updates to guarantee peak performance.

step3.title: Final Certification
step3.description: Rigorous final tests and issuance of the Back Market certificate with a minimum 12-month warranty.

hero.title: Contact Us
hero.subtitle: Do you have any questions about sustainability, our products, or want to collaborate with us? We are here to help.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.alert_success: Thank you for your message! We will get in touch soon.

info_box.title: Contact Information
info_box.social_desc: Follow us to stay up to date with the latest news on sustainability and technology:

q1.question: How can I collaborate with Back Market?
q1.answer: We are open to collaborations with businesses, organizations, and influencers who share our sustainability values. Write to us at sustainability@backmarket.com.

q2.question: Where can I find your sustainability reports?
q2.answer: We publish annual sustainability reports on our website. We also send quarterly updates to our newsletter subscribers.

q3.question: I need information for an educational project
q3.answer: We are happy to help with educational projects. Contact us with the details of your project and we will provide the necessary information.

q4.question: Are you press and want to interview us?
q4.answer: For press inquiries, please contact our communication team at press@backmarket.com with as many details as possible.

hero.title: Climate Change
hero.subtitle: The impact of the technology sector on climate change and how Back Market is leading the sustainable transformation.

impact_sector.title: Impact on the sector
impact_sector.p1: The circular economy can help reduce carbon emissions by 15% before 2032. Back Market is leading this transformation in the electronic device market.
impact_sector.p2: The technology sector is responsible for 4% of global greenhouse gas emissions, a figure that will double by 2025 if no action is taken.
impact_sector.p3: Each refurbished device prevents the extraction of rare materials and the manufacturing of new components, significantly reducing the carbon footprint.

key_data.title: Key facts:
key_data.item1: 80% of the environmental impact is generated during manufacturing
key_data.item2: A new smartphone emits 85 kg of CO₂
key_data.item3: A refurbished smartphone emits only 7 kg of CO₂

challenges.title: Sector Challenges
challenges.item1: Emissions reduction across the global supply chain
challenges.item2: Responsible management of 50 million tons of annual electronic waste
challenges.item3: Promoting reuse and repair over planned obsolescence
challenges.item5: Transitioning to renewable energy sources in manufacturing
challenges.item6: Developing more sustainable and biodegradable materials

response.title: Our Response
response.subtitle: Back Market is actively preparing for these risks through:
response.item6: Expansion of the collection and recycling network

climate.gallery_title: The Visual Impact of Climate Change

hero.title: ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance)
hero.subtitle: Our comprehensive commitment to sustainability, social responsibility, and ethical governance.

environmental.title: 🌍 Environmental
environmental.i1_desc: We prevent millions of electronic devices from ending up in landfills
environmental.i2_desc: A business model built around item reuse and extension of lifecycles
environmental.i3_desc: 1.6 million tons of CO₂ saved up to date
environmental.i4_desc: Minimizing the extraction of brand new primary raw materials
environmental.i5_desc: Targeting net-zero emissions throughout our network by 2030

social.title: 👥 Social
social.i1_desc: Democratizing access to high-quality technological devices
social.i2_desc: Supporting over 2,000 jobs within the refurbishing sector
social.i3_desc: Awareness initiatives focused on responsible consumption habits
social.i4_desc: Working actively to bridge the global tech gap
social.i5_desc: Fair trade practices and living wages for all of our partners

governance.title: ⚖️ Governance
governance.i1_desc: Annual public reporting regarding environmental and structural metrics
governance.i2_desc: ISO 14001, B Corp, and leading green certifications
governance.i3_desc: Strict internal code of conduct and active corporate ethics committee
governance.i4_desc: Meeting and consistently exceeding global regulatory demands
governance.i5_desc: 40% female representation in key corporate executive roles

certs.title: Certifications and Accreditations
certs.bcorp_desc: Certified as a company that meets the highest standards of social and environmental performance
certs.iso_desc: Internationally recognized environmental management system certification
certs.climate_desc: Climate neutrality certification across our corporate operations
certs.ecolabel_desc: Official ecological label of the European Union

commitments.title: Our Commitments
commitments.g1: Carbon neutrality across all corporate operations
commitments.g3: 100% renewable energy sourcing for all facilities
commitments.g4: 50% workforce diversity ratio across all structural layers
commitments.g5: Zero waste sent to landfills - total recycling achievement

footer_card.title: Our commitment is your future
footer_card.desc: Every refurbished device is a milestone toward a healthier planet and a fairer society.
